headlines.title: نشرة الثالثة فجراً
Parliament speaker calls for mass turnout at martyr Imam Khamenei’s funeral
headlines.snippet: Tehran, IRNA – Parliament speaker Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf has called on Iranians to turn out in force for the funeral procession of the martyred Leader of the Islamic Revolution Ayatollah Seyyed Ali Khamenei, saying the nation must “carry its cry for retribution to the world.”

headlines.title: Gharibabadi: Hormuz defined under Iran’s command, not Washington’s
headlines.snippet: Tehran, IRNA – Iran’s deputy foreign minister sharply rejected a US Central Command security meeting held in Bahrain, asserting that the Strait of Hormuz is defined under Iran's command, not CENTCOM’s.

headlines.title: Ghalibaf: Claims of IAEA access to bombed sites are false
headlines.snippet: Tehran, IRNA – The head of Iran’s nuclear negotiating team, Mohammad-Bagher Ghalibaf, said claims that International Atomic Energy Agency inspectors have been granted access to nuclear sites that were bombed in the US-Israeli aggression are false.

headlines.title: Iran prevents transit of over 3,600 kilograms of methamphetamine to Europe
headlines.snippet: A senior Iranian anti-narcotics official announced the seizure of 3,660 kilograms of methamphetamine intended for Europe. Iran highlighted the cost it incurs for global security while facing sanctions in its drug interdiction efforts.
